personas.name: Platform Operator
personas.role: Deploying and operating Aion in production

stories.text: As a platform operator, I want to deploy aion-server from a TOML config file so that I can manage settings without rebuilding the binary.
As a platform operator, I want Prometheus metrics on /metrics so that I can wire Aion into my existing monitoring stack and set alerts on workflow throughput and activity latency.
As a platform operator, I want /health/live and /health/ready probes so that Kubernetes can manage pod lifecycle and route traffic only to healthy instances.
As a platform operator, I want graceful shutdown on SIGTERM so that rolling deploys do not lose in-flight work or require manual intervention.
As a platform operator, I want structured JSON logs with workflow_id and namespace fields so that I can correlate events across my log aggregation pipeline.
As a platform operator, I want environment variable overrides so that I can configure Aion in container deployments where config files are awkward.

personas.name: Workflow Author
personas.role: Writing workflows that use signals for coordination

stories.text: As a workflow author, I want signals sent to my workflow while it is suspended to be delivered when it resumes so that I do not lose coordination messages from external systems.
As a workflow author, I want a clear error when I signal a terminal workflow so that I can distinguish between 'not yet delivered' and 'permanently unreachable'.

personas.name: Security Engineer
personas.role: Enforcing tenant isolation and access control

stories.text: As a security engineer, I want namespace-scoped JWT authentication so that tenants cannot access each other's workflows or activity tasks.
As a security engineer, I want requests without valid tokens to be rejected before reaching any handler so that unauthenticated traffic never touches business logic.
As a security engineer, I want JWKS key rotation without server restart so that credential rotation does not cause downtime.

personas.name: Client SDK Developer
personas.role: Building clients and workers that connect to Aion

stories.text: As a client SDK developer, I want a development server that starts with zero config so that I can run integration tests locally without provisioning infrastructure.
